action.reasoning: Observation: The error shows that CLIPVisionModel doesn't have a 'vision_model' attribute. This means my understanding of the CLIP model structure was incorrect. Looking at the error, I need to fix the model architecture to properly extract the vision components from the CLIP model. The CLIPVisionModel itself is the vision component, so I don't need to extract anything further from it. I'll update the model.py to correctly use the CLIPVisionModel.
